premise: Lateralization as a bias, not a switch. Both hemispheres always run; the dominance dial only shifts which one leads. The right hemisphere generates (divergent, high-variance); the left measures and verifies (convergent, deterministic). The corpus callosum is the set of shared artifacts they pass between them.

presets.balanced: neutral default — byte-identical to the pre-dial pipeline
presets.right: let it breathe: longer/bolder holds, looser sync, richer grade, lenient QA
presets.left: stay precise: shorter legible cuts, tighter sync, calmer grade, strict QA

knobs.maxhold/jump: studio/build-timeline.mjs — footage cut length + jump between sub-shots
knobs.grade: studio/player.html — split-tone intensity (passed via the render payload)
knobs.qa: studio/qa.mjs — sync-drift / min-on-screen thresholds for the eval gate

evalLoop.note: This is the LLMOps trace -> eval -> gate -> release loop. The right hemisphere proposes (render); the left disposes (qa). The CI smoke job is the release gate.
